basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DTC Coordinator, Field Coordinator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation as per Govt. rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree in Public Health / Clinical Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Psychology, Graduate degree in Public Health / Clinical Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Psychology + three years post-qualification experience OR Post-Graduate degree in above field, 12th Pass or equivalent from a recognized board (Commerce)+ minimum 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience OR Graduate degree in Commerce/Accounting + minimum 2 years of relevant post-qualification experience
qualification.details: DTC Coordinator/Research Officer: Post Graduation Degree in Public Health / Clinical Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Psychology. Training and Field Coordinator: Graduate degree in Public Health / Clinical Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Psychology + three years post-qualification experience OR Post-Graduate degree in above field. Accounts-cum-Administrative Assistant: 12th Pass or equivalent from a recognized board (Commerce)+ minimum 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience OR Graduate degree in Commerce/Accounting + minimum 2 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: DTC Coordinator/Research Officer (Equivalent to Project Research Scientist -I Non - Medical as per ICMR Norms)
Training and Field Coordinator (Equivalent to Project Technical Support-III as per ICMR Norms)
Accounts-cum-Administrative Assistant (Equivalent to UDC as per AIIMS, Research Section norms)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 56000/- + 30 % HRA as admissible, Rs. 28000/- + 30 % HRA as admissible, Rs. 17000/- (Consolidated)
salary_details.details: DTC Coordinator/Research Officer: Rs. 56000/- + 30 % HRA as admissible Training and Field Coordinator: Rs. 28000/- + 30 % HRA as admissible Accounts-cum-Administrative Assistant: Rs. 17000/- (Consolidated)

selection_process: Screening of Applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the DTC Coordinator/Research Officer post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of DTC Coordinator/Research Officer (Equivalent to Project Research Scientist -I Non - Medical as per ICMR Norms).

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the posts advertised by AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by AIIMS Delhi is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Accounts-cum-Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Accounts-cum-Administrative Assistant post, candidates must have passed 12th grade (Commerce) with at least 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience, or a Graduate degree in Commerce/Accounting with at least 2 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 includes Screening of Applications, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Training and Field Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Training and Field Coordinator position is Rs. 28000/- plus 30% HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by AIIMS Delhi are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link.
